name: Meeting Intelligence Normalizer — Workato Native Blueprint
summary: Normalizes meetings, transcripts, attendees, and action items from Gong, Zoom, Teams, Otter, Fireflies, Fathom, and other note-taker systems into one reusable meeting-intelligence payload for prep, coaching, and QBR workflows. Native-first Workato blueprint that favors recipe functions, custom connectors, and native delivery/connectivity surfaces over raw HTTP steps.

native_connectors_required: Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Google Calendar connector for event and task creation
Meeting-system connector or approved custom connector for transcript intake
Lookup tables, data tables, or project properties for routing and canonical maps
prohibited_patterns: No repeated Universal HTTP or ad hoc API request actions for Slack, CRM, calendar, or email delivery
No credentials stored in formula literals, project properties comments, or recipe notes
No agent output sent straight to transport or records without JSON schema validation
No routing, dedupe, or retry logic hidden inside opaque code snippets when Recipe Functions or data tables can own it

connectors: Microsoft Teams connector or Workbot for Microsoft Teams
Google Calendar connector for event and task creation

recipe_functions.purpose: Normalize the Meeting Intelligence Normalizer trigger into the shared run_context contract.
Load and normalize the primary Meeting Intelligence Normalizer business inputs into source_record objects.
Join the intermediate context needed for Meeting Intelligence Normalizer, especially Fetch Source Payloads, Normalize Meeting Schema, Resolve Account Association.
Render normalized delivery_payload objects for Meeting Intelligence Normalizer.
Capture deterministic summary, dedupe, and retry state for Meeting Intelligence Normalizer.

steps: Use calendar connector action for Fetch Source Payloads
Use meeting-system connector action for Normalize Meeting Schema
Use meeting-system connector action for Resolve Account Association
Use an LLM connector or AI step to return strict JSON for AI Transcript QA
Use native connector for Publish Canonical Meeting Event
Record deterministic run summary and retry state

ai_transcript_qa.intent: AI Agent flags weak transcripts, missing attendees, ambiguous action items, or poor account mapping before the event is reused downstream.

deployment_notes: Store connector configuration, defaults, and destination IDs in connection objects or project properties.
Use lookup tables or data tables for routing maps, dedupe keys, and canonical mappings.
Keep synthesis agentic, but keep delivery and persistence deterministic.
